text: “has-a” relationship (Association) e Arelationship between two or more classes, where one class uses or interacts with another class. e This relationship can be described as a "has-a" relationship, because one class "has" another class as a property or attribute For example, Person “has-a” Date “ -yearint -name:String -month:int -dob: Date day-int +Person(n:String, mint, dint, yint) +Date(mint, d:int, yint) +getName():String +getyear(yint +getDOB()Date +getMonth(yint +getDay()int +tostring():String e UML Diagram, Person has-a Date. Date class points to Person class (diamond shape)
